request.prompt: Macro extreme close-up portrait: a stainless steel spiral dough hook turns slowly through pale sticky bread dough inside a polished stainless mixing bowl, the dough folds over itself in deliberate slow-motion sweeps, mid-shot a baker's flour-dusted hand enters from frame-right and cracks a single brown egg one-handed against the rim, the yolk drops into the rotating dough, the hand withdraws, the planetary action continues unbroken, 50mm full-frame, shallow depth of field, warm morning window light from camera-left at 3200K, deep cream-and-walnut palette with iconic Empire Red accent, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm color grade, locked 9:16 portrait
